title: The Boys Mod (Stelle's)
description: A superhero-inspired Minecraft mod featuring a large roster of characters from The Boys universe, complete with unique powers, special abilities and immersive battles.
body:
# The Boys Mod (Stelle's)
![The Seven](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebfcad475b26bec885e53eff688037d5fa4abee9.png)

A brutal superhero-inspired Minecraft Forge mod for 1.20.1 featuring powerful characters from The Boys universe with custom combat mechanics and abilities.

This mod focuses on cinematic battles, destructive powers, high-speed combat and immersive superhero gameplay.

Whether you're facing Homelander in a city-destroying battle, surviving Soldier Boy's overwhelming strength, or outrunning enemies as A-Train, every character features unique abilities and combat mechanics designed to recreate their fighting style.

### Characters
* Homelander
* Soldier Boy
* Queen Maeve
* Stormfront
* Black Noir
* Black Noir II
* The Deep
* Kimiko
* Billy Butcher
* Victoria Neuman
* Crimson Countess
* Countess Crow
* Starlight
* A-Train
* Translucent
* Oh Father

Several characters include multiple versions inspired by different moments from the series.

### Weapons & Equipment
Discover a variety of custom weapons and military equipment:
* AK-47
* Pistols
* Minigun
* Rocket Launcher
* Grenades
* Smoke Bombs
* Katana
* Baseball Bat
* Combat Knives
* Queen Maeve's Sword
* Black Noir's Weapons
* Billy Butcher's Crowbar

### Compound V System
Gain extraordinary powers through:

* Compound V
* Compound V1
* Compound V24

Each substance provides unique advantages and changes the way battles unfold.

### Requirements
This mod requires the following mods to work properly:

- **Complements**: CustomNPCs Unofficial (Forge 1.20.1), AAA Particles (2.0.0 Only) and Architectury API
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.20.1
- **Mod Loader**: Forge
- **Java Version**: Java 17
- **RAM**: Minimum 8GB

### License & Asset Usage
This project is distributed under:

**All Rights Reserved**

Some visual assets, effects, or resources may belong to their respective creators and are used under their permitted licenses or public usage terms.

If any asset owner wishes for content attribution or removal, please contact the project author.

### Disclaimer
This mod is a fan-made project inspired by The Boys and is not officially associated with Amazon, Sony, Dynamite Entertainment, or the original creators of The Boys franchise.
